title: Pan Seared Tofu
description: A simple and delicious American-style dish featuring crispy pan-seared tofu.
instructions: Preheat a skillet over medium-high heat.
Cut the tofu into 1-inch cubes and place on a plate.
Season the tofu with garlic powder and salt.
Add 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the preheated skillet.
Sear the tofu cubes until golden brown on all sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Remove the tofu from the skillet and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the pan-seared tofu hot, garnished with your favorite herbs or spices.
